---
title: "Schedule"
format: html
---

::: {.callout-note}
**Note:** Apart from the **starting time**, the schedule is **indicative**. Because we cannot plan a course by the minute, in practice the time points will deviate.
:::

## Course Day Schedule

| Time | Module | Topics | Slides | Exercise |
|------|--------|--------|--------|----------|
| 09:00–10:30 | [Module 1: Concepts & GitHub](../slides/slide_module_1.qmd) | Welcome, introductions, version control problem, Git vs others, terminologies, GitHub account, Markdown | [Slides](../slides/slide_module_1.qmd) | [Ex 1](../exercises/exercise_1_github_account.qmd) · [Ex 2](../exercises/exercise_2_markdown.qmd) |
| 10:30–11:00 | *Coffee Break* | | | |
| 11:00–12:30 | [Module 2: Local Git](../slides/slide_module_2.qmd) | `init`, `status`, `add`, `commit`, `log`, staging area, `diff`, HEAD | [Slides](../slides/slide_module_2.qmd) | [Ex 3](../exercises/exercise_3_local_git.qmd) |
| 12:30–13:30 | *Lunch* | | | |
| 13:30–15:00 | [Module 3: Branching & History](../slides/slide_module_3.qmd) | `branch`, `checkout`, `merge`, merge conflicts, `.gitignore`, `reset` | [Slides](../slides/slide_module_3.qmd) | [Ex 4](../exercises/exercise_4_branching.qmd) |
| 15:00–15:30 | *Coffee Break* | | | |
| 15:30–16:30 | [Module 4: GitHub Collaboration](../slides/slide_module_4.qmd) | SSH setup, `remote`, `push`, `pull`, `clone`, Issues, Projects, Pull Requests | [Slides](../slides/slide_module_4.qmd) | [Ex 5](../exercises/exercise_5_push_pull.qmd) · [Ex 6](../exercises/exercise_6_collaboration.qmd) |
| 16:30–17:15 | Final Exercise | Full workflow: local → branch → push → PR | — | [Final](../exercises/final_exercise.qmd) |
| 17:15–17:30 | Wrap-up | Q&A, cheat sheet, resources, feedback | — | — |
| | | **Post-Course** | | |
| After 17:00 | [Exam](../qmd/exam.qmd) | Optional: 20-question exam (0.25 ECTS) | | [Link](../qmd/exam.qmd) |
| After 17:00 | [Feedback](../qmd/exam.qmd#course-feedback) | Anonymous course feedback | | [Link](../qmd/exam.qmd#course-feedback) |
